eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Coconino, AZ; at 8:57 PM on JUL 18, 2026 Effective until 12:57 AM JUL 19, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
Flash Flooding may occur in the Timberline, Wupatki Trails, and Fernwood area.

If indoors, shelter in place.  If outdoors, get to high ground and do not enter drainages.. Know where your children and pets are and do not let children play in drainages. Please stay safe.
